summary: Base Graffiticode dialect — a small functional language for evaluating expressions or rendering simple UI primitives.
in_scope: Arithmetic, string manipulation, list construction and traversal, ranges
Lambdas, let-bound helpers, pattern matching on numbers/lists/pairs/records/tags
Comparison operators (eq / ne / gt / lt / ge / le)
UI primitives: hello (greetings), image (URL), theme (DARK / LIGHT), id (element identifier)
out_of_scope: Anything that produces a domain-specific artifact (assessments, spreadsheets, charts, maps, diagrams, boards, data pipelines, games, puzzles) — those belong in higher-numbered dialects, not in L0175
External data (HTTP, file, database) — L0175 evaluates a closed program
Custom rendering beyond hello / image / theme / id
Cross-language composition via import — each item runs in exactly one dialect
